text.zh: AI Scientist 将计算研究的多个步骤串成自动循环，A-Lab 则把机器学习与机器人实验连接到材料合成流程。
text.en: The AI Scientist connected multiple computational research steps into an automated loop, while A-Lab linked machine learning and robotic experimentation for materials synthesis.

text.zh: A-Lab 论文报告系统在 17 天运行中成功合成 58 个目标中的 41 个新材料；AI Scientist 仍是需要独立复现和真实同行评议的研究原型。
text.en: The A-Lab paper reported successful synthesis of 41 of 58 targeted novel materials during 17 days of operation; the AI Scientist remained a research prototype requiring independent replication and real peer review.
